title: bidens urophylla
intro: Bidens urophylla, also known as Urophora, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bidens urophylla include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Bidens urophylla is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
